item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-07-02 - Today's Summary
[sustained_hot] ChromeDevTools/chrome-devtools-mcp (+3618 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Chrome DevTools for coding agents Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +3618，总 stars 44,987，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] hasaneyldrm/exercises-dataset (+2330 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: A comprehensive dataset of 433 fitness exercises. Each entry includes name, category, target muscle group, equipment, instructions, thumbnail image, and animation video. Why it matters: Other AI 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +2330，总 stars 9,035，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] stas00/ml-engineering (+26 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: RAG / Knowledge Base Description: Machine Learning Engineering Open Book Why it matters: RAG / Knowledge Base 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +26，前 3 日均值 4.7，加速度 5.6x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看数据接入、检索质量和 production workflow，而不是只看 demo 效果。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] google-ai-edge/mediapipe (+36 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: Cross-platform, customizable ML solutions for live and streaming media. Why it matters: Local LLM / Inference 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +36，前 3 日均值 15.7，加速度 2.3x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看部署复杂度、性能边界和模型兼容性，判断是否能进入本地 AI 应用栈。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] ChatGPTNextWeb/NextChat (+15 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: NextChat is a lightweight, cross-platform AI chat client that supports multiple LLMs (Claude, GPT-4, Gemini, DeepSeek) with one-click deployment and a privacy-first local-storage design. Why it matters: With 88,131 stars and a 24h star delta of 22, the project shows sustained high interest. The acceleration ratio of 2.9 (high) indicates a sudden breakout in attention, likely driven by recent feature additions like MCP support, real-time chat, and the iOS app release. The 7-day average star delta of 7.8 confirms consistent growth, but the acceleration signals a recent spike. Developer insight: The rapid adoption of NextChat signals a shift toward unified, self-hosted AI interfaces that reduce dependency on single providers. The MCP support hints at a future where AI tools interoperate via standardized protocols, opening opportunities for plugin ecosystems. Risk: Medium

item.title: [sudden_breakout] HKUDS/Vibe-Trading (+1392 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: "Vibe-Trading: Your Personal Trading Agent" Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +1392，前 3 日均值 696，加速度 2x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+1811 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1811，总 stars 48,928，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] calesthio/OpenMontage (+1584 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1584，总 stars 31,505，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] santifer/career-ops (+656 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Workflow Automation Description: AI-powered job search system built on Claude Code. 14 skill modes, Go dashboard, PDF generation, batch processing. Why it matters: AI Workflow Automation 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +656，前 3 日均值 216.7，加速度 3x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low
